mnemonics: CIA in the CLOUD: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability are the core of cloud security.
keyPoints: Shared Responsibility Model (Security OF the cloud vs. SECURITY IN the cloud)
Identity and Access Management (IAM) as the first line of defense
Data Encryption (at rest and in transit)
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is solely responsible for all security (misunderstanding the Shared Responsibility Model)
Over-provisioning user permissions ('just make them an admin') leading to excessive access risk
Storing sensitive data in unencrypted public storage buckets
